creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
It looks like this is an issue with other p5-Pod ports:
```
$ grep -rl Pod::Parser textproc/p5-Pod-* | egrep '(Build|Makefile)\.PL' | egrep -v 'p5-Pod-(MinimumVersion|Parser|XML)/' | xargs grep -C 1 Pod::Parser
textproc/p5-Pod-Abstract/work/Pod-Abstract-0.20/Makefile.PL-        'Test::More' => 0,
textproc/p5-Pod-Abstract/work/Pod-Abstract-0.20/Makefile.PL:        'Pod::Parser' => 0,
textproc/p5-Pod-Abstract/work/Pod-Abstract-0.20/Makefile.PL-        'IO::String' => 0,
--
textproc/p5-Pod-Constants/work/Pod-Constants-0.19/Makefile.PL-  PREREQ_PM => {
textproc/p5-Pod-Constants/work/Pod-Constants-0.19/Makefile.PL:          qw/Pod::Parser  1.13/,
textproc/p5-Pod-Constants/work/Pod-Constants-0.19/Makefile.PL-  },
--
textproc/p5-Pod-DocBook/work/Pod-DocBook-1.2/Makefile.PL-    PREREQ_PM         => { Digest::MD5      => 0,
textproc/p5-Pod-DocBook/work/Pod-DocBook-1.2/Makefile.PL:                          Pod::Parser      => 0,
textproc/p5-Pod-DocBook/work/Pod-DocBook-1.2/Makefile.PL-                          Pod::ParseLink   => 0,
--
textproc/p5-Pod-HtmlEasy/work/Pod-HtmlEasy-1.0108/Build.PL-                        'Pod::Escapes'   => '1.04',
textproc/p5-Pod-HtmlEasy/work/Pod-HtmlEasy-1.0108/Build.PL:                        'Pod::Parser'    => '1.37',
textproc/p5-Pod-HtmlEasy/work/Pod-HtmlEasy-1.0108/Build.PL-                        'Pod::ParseLink' => '1.06',
--
textproc/p5-Pod-HtmlEasy/work/Pod-HtmlEasy-1.0108/Makefile.PL-                        'Pod::Escapes'   => 1.04,
textproc/p5-Pod-HtmlEasy/work/Pod-HtmlEasy-1.0108/Makefile.PL:                        'Pod::Parser'    => 2.3.1,
textproc/p5-Pod-HtmlEasy/work/Pod-HtmlEasy-1.0108/Makefile.PL-                        'Pod::ParseLink' => 1.06,
--
textproc/p5-Pod-LaTeX/work/Pod-LaTeX-0.61/Build.PL-                'Pod::Find'  => 0,
textproc/p5-Pod-LaTeX/work/Pod-LaTeX-0.61/Build.PL:                'Pod::Parser' => 0,
textproc/p5-Pod-LaTeX/work/Pod-LaTeX-0.61/Build.PL-                'Pod::ParseUtils' => 0.30,
--
textproc/p5-Pod-Stripper/work/Pod-Stripper-0.22/Makefile.PL-    'PREREQ_PM'             => { 'Test' => 1.15,
textproc/p5-Pod-Stripper/work/Pod-Stripper-0.22/Makefile.PL:                         'Pod::Parser' => 1.13,
textproc/p5-Pod-Stripper/work/Pod-Stripper-0.22/Makefile.PL-                       ,},
--
textproc/p5-Pod-Xhtml/work/Pod-Xhtml-1.61/Makefile.PL-              PREREQ_PM => {
textproc/p5-Pod-Xhtml/work/Pod-Xhtml-1.61/Makefile.PL:                            Pod::Parser => 0,
textproc/p5-Pod-Xhtml/work/Pod-Xhtml-1.61/Makefile.PL-                            Pod::ParseUtils => 0,
```
